title: Cubic Font
description: A bold, clean, and blocky font for Minecraft, replacing the default font with a geometric, pixel-perfect design. Works in vanilla and modpacks.
body:
# **❗️The small "t" of pictures is old, the new one is already at latest version!**
![cubic font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b293d2f9efd1b8f276dc80de376c173b48fe6f.png)

A clean, bold, and blocky typeface for Minecraft 1.20.2–1.21.x

> **Give your Minecraft UI a sharp new look. Cubic Font replaces the default font with a geometric, pixel-perfect cubic design that fits Minecraft’s blocky aesthetic while improving clarity and readability.**




---

## ✨ Features

- 🔳 **Replaces Minecraft’s default font with a custom cubic style**
- 📐 **Bold, clean, and block-aligned character design**
  
- 🎮 **Suitable for modern GUIs and retro pixel-art styles**
  
- 🧩 **Works well in vanilla and most modpacks**



---

## 🧩 Compatibility

✅ **Minecraft versions: 1.20.2–1.21.x**

✅ **No mods required (vanilla resource pack)**

✅ **Compatible with GUI mods (REI, JEI, Sodium, etc.)**

🔁 **Works with OptiFine, Iris, and most shaders**

🚫 **May conflict with other resource packs that replace the font**

⚠️ **Known issue: bold text may not render correctly**



---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the .zip from the Versions section


1. Place it into your resourcepacks folder


1. Enable it from the Resource Packs menu


1. Enjoy your new UI font




---

## 👀 Preview

![Test In Ghast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db05f1571220efea41d17acb2d300ab2c6dd73a.png)


---
